template.name: Suppress Stock Project Breadcrumbs on Scrum Pages

xpath.attribute: page_name not in ['scrum_projects', 'scrum_project', 'scrum_sprint', 'scrum_task', 'scrum_subtask_new', 'scrum_subtask_edit', 'scrum_backlog'] and (page_name == 'project' or project)

div.p: View and manage your Scrum projects
Projects you have been invited to follow
You don't have access to any Scrum projects yet.
No sprints have been created yet.
No tasks assigned to this sprint yet.
No subtasks yet. Add one to get started.
No employee record linked to your account. Contact your administrator.
No time logged against this task yet.

div.label: Move to Stage

label.t-attf-class: scrum_stage_option #{' scrum_stage_option_selected' if stage.id == subtask.stage_id.id else ''}

div.p: Invalid stage transitions will show an error message.

div.t-attf-class: scrum_flow_step #{' scrum_flow_step_active' if stage.id == subtask.stage_id.id else ''}

div.p: Tasks not yet assigned to a sprint
No tasks in the backlog — everything is assigned to a sprint.
